scripts.extract-items: cargo run --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --features extract-swf --bin extract-swf -- --source ${GLITCH_ART_PATH:-$HOME/work/tinyspeck/glitch-items} --output tools/asset-pipeline/extracted/items
scripts.ingest-items: cargo run --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --features cas-tool --bin cas-tool -- ingest --input assets/sprites/items --manifest manifests/items.json
scripts.restore-items: cargo run --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --features cas-tool --bin cas-tool -- restore --manifest manifests/items.json --output assets/sprites/items
scripts.pipeline-items: npm run extract-items && npm run pack-items && npm run ingest-items
scripts.ingest-music: cargo run --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --features cas-tool --bin cas-tool -- ingest --input assets/music/tracks --manifest manifests/music.json
scripts.restore-music: cargo run --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --features cas-tool --bin cas-tool -- restore --manifest manifests/music.json --output assets/music/tracks
